name: hourly: a bare hour like '9' asks am or pm instead of guessing (B9/F17)
comment: Guessing wrong on a bare 1-11 puts the booking twelve hours from where the guest meant: the wrong window is held, the wrong room is blocked, and the guest arrives to a room that was never theirs. One extra question is far cheaper than that, so ambiguity asks. 0 and 12-23 are unambiguous 24-hour readings and parse straight through — covered in test/hourly.test.js. No writes: the guest stays in AWAITING_HOURLY_DETAILS and their next message completes the step.
